title: Melocactus pachycephalus
taxonomy: Melocactus pachycephalus is classified within the family Cactaceae, which includes all species of cacti. This family is further divided into 32 subfamilies, and Melocactus pachycephalus falls under the subfamily Cactoideae. Within the genus Melocactus, Melocactus pachycephalus is one of the many species found in this group, which is primarily native to South America. The genus Melocactus is characterized by its distinctive areoles and globular stems, which are typical of the Cactaceae family. The species classification of Melocactus pachycephalus is further specified within the botanical community based on its unique characteristics and morphological features.
